title: Re:Start Quest MVP planning synthesis
reviewerSource: No TASK-045 reviewer report was present; reviewer constraints are derived from AGENTS.md and docs/CODE_QUALITY_GUARDRAILS.md.
finalMvpDirection: Build Re:Start Quest as a job-search behavior re-entry engine, centered on onboarding, daily quest generation, failure reason capture, easier quest redesign, and dashboard reflection.
mustNotBuildInMvp: willpower, sincerity, risk, or surveillance scoring
feature-marketing landing page as first screen

stateRules: A TODO quest can become DONE.
A TODO quest can become FAILED only with a failureReason.
A FAILED quest can become REDESIGNED only after a redesign result is saved.
A DONE quest cannot be failed or redesigned.
A redesigned quest must be easier or shorter than the original quest.

nextTaskCandidates.title: MVP domain/API/AI contract
nextTaskCandidates.deliverable: enum, DTO, endpoint, AI JSON schema, and error-code contract

nextTaskCandidates.title: Backend quest core use cases
nextTaskCandidates.deliverable: generate, fail, redesign, and dashboard use cases with mock AI client

nextTaskCandidates.title: Frontend core flow prototype
nextTaskCandidates.deliverable: onboarding, today quests, failure reason, redesign result, and dashboard screens

nextTaskCandidates.title: MVP API integration
nextTaskCandidates.deliverable: browser-verifiable core loop using backend APIs

nextTaskCandidates.title: LLM provider adapter and JSON validation
nextTaskCandidates.deliverable: QuestAiClient provider adapter with invalid response, timeout, and quota handling

nextTaskCandidates.title: Minimal auth and user data isolation
nextTaskCandidates.deliverable: login/signup, current user lookup, and per-user quest isolation
